summary: El índice SOX se ha revalorizado un 97% desde los mínimos de finales de marzo. Leer

title: Expansión regala el póster de la Bolsa
summary: Expansión regala a sus lectores el mayor gráfico bursátil hecho jamás, con motivo de su 40 Aniversario. Leer

title: Zapatero: el custodio de Anastasia Romanov
summary: Es tan imposible salir dignamente de esta situación que una parte de la izquierda ya huye al galope del que hasta no hace mucho era un referente. Leer

title: Esperanzas de paz entre EEUU e Irán
summary: El ansiado acuerdo para poner fin de una vez a las hostilidades entre Irán y Estados Unidos está más cerca de ser una realidad. Leer

title: Eurodiputados piden a la Comisión Europea rechazar la injerencia de Trump en las elecciones de Colombia
summary: En una carta enviada a la presidenta de la Comisión Europea, los 16 eurodiputados de izquierda señalan que "es una interferencia directa en el proceso democrático de Colombia y socavan tanto el pluralismo democrático como la soberanía nacional". Leer

title: Europa aprovecha la ausencia de Trump y los éxitos de Ucrania para reanudar contactos con Rusia
summary: Rusia aceptó recibir este jueves a los embajadores de Francia, Alemania y Reino Unido, pese a que rechaza una posible mediación de la Unión Europea (UE). Leer

title: Why most homes in Spain don't have smoke detectors or fire alarms
summary: If you’re from a country where smoke detectors are the norm or even obligatory by law, you will have no doubt noticed the lack of them in homes here in Spain. Find out the reason behind this.

title: Plane trouble delays pope's return after migrant-focused Spain visit
summary: Pope Leo XIV on Friday wrapped up a week-long visit to Spain that highlighted migrant issues, but his return to Rome was held up after his plane experienced a technical problem.

title: EU to ban airlines from charging parents to sit with children
summary: Airlines will be banned from charging parents to get seats next to their children under an EU reform of passenger rights agreed on Friday that stopped short of more divisive changes, diplomats said.

title: Inside Spain: Fake football jerseys and pope-mania
summary: In this edition of Inside Spain we look at what’s been trending in the country: knock-offs of the Spanish national team’s omnipresent white kit, and (also wearing white) Pope Leo and the impact of his historic tour on young Spaniards in particular.

title: The reasons why Brits are buying far fewer homes in Spain
summary: Although Brits remain top of the leader board when it comes to foreign property buyers in Spain, their numbers have fallen dramatically. Brexit is undoubtedly playing a part in this drop, but it's not the only factor.

title: REVEALED: Five subsidies pensioners in Spain can claim
summary: If you're a pensioner in Spain, it's worth knowing that there are several benefits available to you, in order to help you out with rising living costs.
